name: Spicy Ramen
description: A warm bowl of ramen with spicy broth, noodles, egg, and green onions.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Toasted bread topped with mashed avocado, lemon, chili flakes, and herbs.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, basil, and olive oil.

name: Chicken Tikka Bowl
description: Grilled chicken tikka served over rice with yogurt sauce and vegetables.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
description: Sweet coconut sticky rice served with ripe mango slices.

name: Double Cheeseburger
description: A juicy double cheeseburger with lettuce, pickles, onions, and special sauce.

name: Green Curry
description: A creamy green curry with vegetables, coconut milk, herbs, and jasmine rice.

name: Salmon Poke Bowl
description: Fresh salmon served over rice with cucumber, avocado, seaweed, and sesame.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a soft molten center and a rich cocoa flavor.

name: Veggie Burrito Bowl
description: Rice, beans, grilled vegetables, salsa, corn, avocado, and lime crema.
